name: sistema-pedidos-off-grid
description: Sistema de Pedidos 100% Offline com Rede Local

scripts.dev: npm run -w apps/server dev & npm run -w apps/frontend dev
scripts.build: npm run -w apps/server build && npm run -w apps/frontend build
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run test:e2e:kiosk && npm run test:e2e:admin:orders
scripts.test:contract: npm run test:contract:auth && npm run test:contract:orders && npm run test:contract:reports && npm run test:contract:users
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e:smoke && npm run test:e2e:size-change && npm run test:e2e:menu:assembly-extra && npm run test:e2e:delivery:persisted && npm run test:e2e:orders:negative && npm run test:contract
scripts.type-check: npm run -w apps/server type-check && npm run -w apps/frontend type-check
scripts.lint: npm run -w apps/server lint && npm run -w apps/frontend lint
